description_long: This is a large, modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage and a distinctive blue and white livery. The airplane features four underwing turbofan engines, two on each wing, and a swept low-wing configuration with slight dihedral angles. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a multi-window canopy for pilot visibility. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with visible main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit.
description: A large, four-engine commercial jet airliner with a blue and white livery, swept low wings, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with four underwing engines.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the fuselage, engine placement, and tail fin with airline logo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the opposite fuselage side, engine arrangement, and tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept configuration with slight dihedral angles and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
